extraction.one_line_summary: PREIDLER Georg from breakaway won Stage 17 atop Los Machucos after FROOME cracked on 30%+ gradients, losing 42s to NIBALI and 1:20 to CONTADOR
tactical_patterns: FROOME unable to respond on extreme gradient pitches over 30%, vulnerable when acceleration required rather than sustained pace.
CONTADOR attacked before steepest section where FROOME historically weak, continuing podium hunt with targeted timing on gradient changes.
NIBALI used teammate NIEVE pacing to distance FROOME, showing Sky's support weakness when leader already compromised.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: showed clear weakness on extreme gradients after previous day's time trial effort, couldn't follow any accelerations
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: attacking form continues despite age, specifically targeting gradient changes where Froome vulnerable, closed 1:20 on third place
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: gained 42s on race leader with NIEVE support, demonstrating better recovery than Froome after time trial
rider_signals.PREIDLER Georg: positive: held off Contador by 28s after all-in pacing strategy on penultimate climb
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Johan: negative: attempted move with teammate support on penultimate climb failed completely
